arts.ttl: Tony Mowbray opens up on Sunderland reunion in West Brom play-off showdown
arts.sum: West Brom manager Tony Mowbray insists there is "no resentment" to former club Sunderland as he prepares to face them tomorrow lunchtime, saying it was an honour to be at the helm. We had a very young team but performed to good levels and won lots of games and made it exciting for the fans, I think.

arts.sum: The Northern Ireland international started on the bench in the 1-0 loss to Norwich with a calf complaint from international duty but he is ready to go against Tony Mowbray's former team on Saturday lunchtime. Tony Mowbray issues Isaac Price fitness update amid West Brom play-off tilt
